Conflict.EnergyEdit.Note: Both mods change how much energy your actions cost. With both running, the change is bigger.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose tool, meditation, sleep and energy diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.auto_equip_new_tool.name: Auto Equip New Tool
cfg.auto_equip_new_tool.desc: Automatically equip a new tool of the same type if the current one breaks.
cfg.make_tools_last_longer.name: Make Tools Last Longer
cfg.make_tools_last_longer.desc: Increase the durability of tools so they last longer before breaking.
cfg.auto_wake_from_meditation_when_stats: Auto Wake From Meditation When Stats Full
End the meditation automatically once all stats it would restore are full, instead of waiting for the full duration.
cfg.speed_up_meditation.name: Speed Up Meditation
cfg.speed_up_meditation.desc: Reduce the in-game time meditation takes to finish.
cfg.energy_spend_before_sleep_debuff.des: Total energy you need to spend in a day before the sleep debuff kicks in (vanilla is 300).
cfg.speed_up_sleep.name: Speed Up Sleep
cfg.speed_up_sleep.desc: Reduce the in-game time sleeping takes to finish.
cfg.spend_half_energy.name: Spend Half Energy
cfg.spend_half_energy.desc: Halve the energy cost of every action. Turning this on switches Unlimited Energy off.
cfg.spend_half_gratitude.name: Spend Half Gratitude
cfg.spend_half_gratitude.desc: Halve the gratitude cost of every action. Turning this on switches Unlimited Gratitude off.
cfg.spend_half_sanity.name: Spend Half Sanity
cfg.spend_half_sanity.desc: Halve the sanity cost of every action. Turning this on switches Unlimited Sanity off.
cfg.unlimited_energy.name: Unlimited Energy
cfg.unlimited_energy.desc: Energy never depletes. Turning this on switches Spend Half Energy off.
cfg.unlimited_gratitude.name: Unlimited Gratitude
cfg.unlimited_gratitude.desc: Gratitude never depletes. Turning this on switches Spend Half Gratitude off.
cfg.unlimited_sanity.name: Unlimited Sanity
cfg.unlimited_sanity.desc: Sanity never depletes. This overrides Spend Half Sanity; turning this on switches Spend Half Sanity off.
cfg.unlimited_health.name: Unlimited Health
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
